name: Wilmington Upholstered Round Ottoman Cream Boucle - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee Assembly Required
description:
Round out your family room, living room or bedroom in classic style with this Wilmington Upholstered Round Ottoman from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Set atop a wooden frame and feet, this round ottoman is upholstered with a softly textured fabric for subtle dimensional appeal. Crafted in a versatile cream color, this upholstered ottoman features a two-tier design that adds a sophisticated look to your space. Plus, it’s a great piece for adding extra seating when you need it.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
